finding_results.evidence: Concrete operational rules and the off-campus meeting choice now carry the shift at chapters/chapter_10.md:324 and chapters/chapter_10.md:361; the stairwell/alley beats externalize the new caution at chapters/chapter_10.md:369 and chapters/chapter_10.md:371; the close now lands on the folded note, Mohit's warm text, and the turn toward Alder at chapters/chapter_10.md:409 and chapters/chapter_10.md:417.
finding_results.notes: Removed the repeated abstract paraphrases of compromised space and consolidated the ending around behavior, route choice, and held objects while preserving the hidden older proof.
finding_results.summary: The closing no longer reiterates the surveillance thesis through multiple conceptual nouns; it embodies the new paranoia through concrete procedure and image.

summary: Revised the chapter-10 close to replace repeated abstract restatement with concrete operational secrecy, preserving continuity, voice, and the chapter's harder emotional pressure.
